rows.description: Soluta D.no Rectori Scholariibus et Officiariis.
rows.notes: Description combined from both extractors. 'Soluta' and 'Officiariis' were clearer in gemini-flash, while 'Scholariibus' was clearer in gpt-5-mini. Both correctly identified it as a header with no amounts.

rows.notes: Chosen from gpt-5-mini. The image clearly shows monetary amounts 'D: 19 1 10' for this line, making it an entry. gemini-flash incorrectly identified it as a header with no amounts.
